elements.text: You are encouraged to complete 2 short MindTrails-Movement programs tomorrow. Thinking ahead to your day tomorrow, are there specific times you would like to receive a notification to complete a ~5 minute program to help manage a stressful or upsetting situation?

elements.message: ¡Es hora de practicar el pensamiento flexible! Dirígete a MindTrails Español para tu sesión programada.
elements.name: schedule_session
